boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the operator execute this Banking / KYC / AML controls action now? Action: foreign transfer with stale country-risk review. Boundary: transfer note cannot replace current country-risk review.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Current control record closes exact requested boundary.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No escalation needed; source records are controlling.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: country-risk review, destination, purpose match confirmed current

final_answer: The packet's controlling control record confirms the current country-risk review, destination, and purpose match are exact and tied to this foreign transfer action. The policy permits execution when source records close the exact boundary, and the communication boundary note cannot override that authority. Based on source records, the action may proceed.
